notes:
The game process starts (as indicated by Steam: - Running), but appears to get stuck with no window appearing.
The process accepts SIGTERM and dies gracefully.
title: A Vampyre Story

notes: CSMT needs to be disabled, otherwise it runs extremely slow. Set the launch option "PROTON_DUMP_DEBUG_COMMANDS=1 %command%", launch and exit the game and run in a terminal: "/tmp/proton_$USER/run regedit". Go to "HKEY_CURRENT_USER/Software/Wine/", right click, select New->Key and name it "Direct3D". Then create a DWord value inside "Direct3D" and name it "csmt". Exit regedit & play.
title: A Vampyre Story
